name: University of Pennsylvania
meets_full_need_notes: Penn meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted undergraduates and has expanded support for middle-income families.
no_loan_notes: Penn's all-grant policy means no loans in need-based aid packages for all undergraduates receiving institutional aid.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive same need-based aid methodology as RD. ED is binding; release possible if aid package insufficient.
special_programs: Highly aided initiative for middle-income families
appeal_policy: Students can request reevaluation with supporting documentation for changed income, medical expenses, or unusual circumstances.
